introSection: Kopermijn is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Drievliet Family Park in The Hague, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. "Kopermijn" is Dutch for "Copper Mine".

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Deep reddish orange track and brown supports.

fullText:
Kopermijn is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Drievliet Family Park in The Hague, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. "Kopermijn" is Dutch for "Copper Mine".



Deep reddish orange track and brown supports.
